data.name: Bio
data.value: Backend Software Developer with over 7 years of experience, focused on .NET development, solid experience building and evolving APIs, microservices, monoliths, and robust, scalable applications. Actively involved in creating high-quality solutions, applying principles such as SOLID, Clean Architecture, and Domain-Driven Design (DDD) to ensure maintainability and evolution of projects. Solid experience in agile development environments (Scrum/Kanban) and in DevOps culture.
